case_title: FARID SHARIF VS. NABIL ALI ISMAEL

docket_entries.description: CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT ISMAEL, NABIL ALI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SHARIF, FARID
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-31-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 24, 2014, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 31, 2014, AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-16-2014 CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 58963390)
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT SHARIF, FARID HEARING SET FOR JAN-31-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT FARID SHARIF'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER - DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. CROSS-DEFENDANT'S MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF THE DEMURRER CONTAINS NO ARGUMENT REGARDING THE DEFICIENCIES OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS IT IS UNTIMELY. (CCP 435(D), 430.40(B).) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ISMAEL, NABIL ALI ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ISMAEL, NABIL ALI
OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT AND OPPOS TO MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT ISMAEL, NABIL ALI
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-24-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF PRO PER ON APR-11-2014 THROUGH JUN-05-2014 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARIF, FARID

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARIF, FARID AS TO DEFENDANT ISMAEL, NABIL ALI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-05-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-10-2014
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-05-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-15-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-11-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-15-2014 - CASE SETTLED WITH SETTLEMENT MANAGER, PANG LY, IN DEPT. 603. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON APR-25-2017 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT `, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARIF, FARID SERVED NOV-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ISMAEL, NABIL ALI
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT SHARIF, FARID
ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT SHARIF, FARID
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HAYNES, GREGORY MELVIN SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR SHARIF, FARID SHARIF, FARID
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-25-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
